caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a white button-down shirt, stands in an indoor setting speaking into a handheld microphone. He is positioned in front of a large yellow and green promotional backdrop that features a portrait of another man and text in both English and a non-Latin script. Legible English text on the banner reads "2024" and "INDIA!". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his expression from a serious speaking demeanor to a smile. He begins by holding the microphone with both hands near his chest, then transitions to holding it in his right hand while bringing his palms together in a traditional greeting or clapping gesture. The background remains constant, showing a white ceiling with industrial lighting and air vents, while the man remains the central focus throughout the clip.
